title: contact_set atomicity: blocked write commits when displayName type check fails
description: Trigger: PATCH {"blocked":true, "displayName":42} on an existing contact. blocked=true is processed first — store.set_contact_blocked succeeds and commits. Then displayName:42 fails the as_str() type check, inserts into not_updated, and continues. The blocked write is now in the DB but the response reports notUpdated. RFC 8620 §7.1 requires all-or-nothing atomicity. contact_set received no Phase 1 validate-then-write treatment when space_set was fixed in this batch.
